assertions.evidence: Response provides 8 clear ordered steps: baseline version, install deps, .releaserc.json config, OIDC setup, workflow update, local test, verify release, document format
Response contrasts manual process (error-prone, delayed, human errors) with automated (deterministic, seconds-to-minutes, audit trail)
Response addresses 8 pitfalls: release not triggered, wrong version bumped, GitHub token issues, npm auth failures, inconsistent versioning, manual conflicts, branch protection, monorepo challenges
Response emphasizes Conventional Commits format and includes team documentation guidance
Response explains that semantic-release analyzes commits since last tag and recommends backing up old changelog
